title: KunaToken — EMT money machine (mint / circulate / redeem) + governance lane
stateExpr: pendingGovernance == address(0) ? OPERATING : GOV_HANDOVER (money flows are self-loops on either state; PAUSED is an orthogonal overlay)
scope: one machine instance for the whole token; the governance lane is the only stored lifecycle, all supply/circulation flows are self-loops

EUR (fiat, SEPA).note: off-chain leg at the issuer (MiCA e-money model, Monerium mould) — not part of this config

states.label: Governance handover pending
states.guard: pendingGovernance != address(0) — token fully operational, only the governance seat is in transit (two-step transfer)

transitions.label: SEPA deposit → issue
guards: identityRegistry == 0 || identityRegistry.isPerson(to) (personhood issuance policy, NotPerson otherwise)

money.note: off-chain leg: SEPA deposit received first

sideEffects.note: issuance gate — mint recipient must be a verified person when the policy is on

transitions.label: redemption at par
guards: onlyIssuer (Monerium controller model — holder grants NO allowance)
NO pause check — redemption works even when paused (MiCA right to redeem at par)

money.note: supply shrinks by exactly the fiat paid out
off-chain leg: SEPA payout at par

transitions.note: Deliberately NOT blocked by the PAUSED overlay — freezing circulation must not freeze the exit.

transitions.label: ERC-677 pay-and-notify
guards: if to is a contract: to.onTokenTransfer(sender, amount, data) must not revert (reverting receiver reverts the whole transfer)

money.note: one-tx pay-and-notify (PinkaCrowdfund Path A, Monerium-EURe style)

transitions.note: Receiver callback IERC677Receiver.onTokenTransfer is an external contract outside this atlas.

transitions.label: EIP-2612 gasless approval
transitions.note: Approval only — no value moves; enables gasless flows.

transitions.label: propose new governance
transitions.note: Two-step transfer: nothing changes until the proposed address accepts — a typo cannot brick the token (the EIP712Verifier one-shot transferAdmin lesson).

overlays.label: Paused (overlay)
overlays.note: Freezes issuance and circulation but NOT burnFrom (MiCA redemption right — the exit stays open) and NOT approvals (approve/permit) or the governance lane.

notes: MONEY MACHINE: all supply and circulation flows are self-loops — KUNA enters via mint (SEPA deposit, personhood-gated when identityRegistry is set) and leaves via burnFrom (redemption at par, issuer-only controller model).
The stored lifecycle is the governance two-step lane (pendingGovernance zero/non-zero); the token is fully operational in BOTH states.
PAUSED-with-exception is the machine's most important edge: burnFrom is the only value-moving function that ignores the pause.
Config transitions without state semantics (setIssuer, setIdentityRegistry, approve) are intentionally excluded; approve/permit carry no value.
EUR legs are off-chain at the issuer (MiCA EMT, Monerium mould) — modeled like the SEPA legs of pinka-crowdfund for consistency.
